mapper.insert:
insert into characters
uuid,
user_id,
id,
lv,
stack_count,
#{uuid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lv,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{stackCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update characters
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lv = #{lv,jdbcType=INTEGER},
max_lv = #{maxLv,jdbcType=INTEGER},
flyup = #{flyup,jdbcType=INTEGER},
stack_count = #{stackCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where uuid = #{uuid,jdbcType=INTEGER} and is_delete='0'
update characters set go_into_num = '0', update_time= now() where user_id = #{userId} and is_delete='0'
update characters set is_delete = '1', update_time= now() where uuid = #{uuid}
update characters set go_into_num = #{num}, update_time= now() where user_id = #{userId} and id = #{id} and is_delete='0'

update characters set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, lv = #{lv,jdbcType=INTEGER}, max_lv = #{maxLv,jdbcType=INTEGER}, stack_count = #{stackCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, go_into_num = #{goIntoNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, exp = #{exp,jdbcType=INTEGER}, is_delete = #{isDelete}, flyup = #{flyup}, update_time= now() where uuid = #{uuid,jdbcType=INTEGER} and is_delete='0'
mapper.select: select cd.id, cd.star, 1 as lv, 0 as go_into_num, 0 as flyup, cd.name, cd.camp, cd.hp_growth, cd.attack_growth, cd.defence_growth, cd.pierce_growth, cd.speed_growth, cd.profession, cd.coll_attack, cd.coll_speed, cd.coll_hp, cd.passive_introduce_one, cd.passive_introduce_two, cd.passive_introduce_three, cd.passive_introduce_threee, cd.passive_introduce_four, cd.passive_introduce_one_str, cd.passive_introduce_two_str, cd.passive_introduce_three_str, cd.passive_introduce_four_str, cd.wl_atk, cd.hy_atk, cd.ds_atk, cd.fd_atk, cd.wl_def, cd.hy_def, cd.ds_def, cd.fd_def, cd.sex, cd.zl_def from card cd

select cs.uuid, cs.user_id, cs.id, cs.lv, cd.star, cs.stack_count, cs.go_into_num, cs.exp, cs.max_lv, cs.flyup, cs.is_delete, cs.create_time, cs.update_time, cd.name, cd.camp, cd.hp_growth, cd.attack_growth, cd.defence_growth, cd.pierce_growth, cd.speed_growth, cd.profession, cd.coll_attack, cd.coll_speed, cd.coll_hp, cd.passive_introduce_one, cd.passive_introduce_two, cd.passive_introduce_three, cd.passive_introduce_threee, cd.passive_introduce_four, cd.passive_introduce_one_str, cd.passive_introduce_two_str, cd.passive_introduce_three_str, cd.passive_introduce_four_str, cd.wl_atk, cd.hy_atk, cd.ds_atk, cd.fd_atk, cd.wl_def, cd.hy_def, cd.ds_def, cd.fd_def, cd.sex, cd.zl_def from characters cs left join card cd on cd.id = cs.id where cs.is_delete = '0'

select cs.uuid, cs.user_id, cs.id, cs.lv, cd.star, cs.stack_count, cs.go_into_num, cs.exp, cs.max_lv, cd.name, cd.camp, cd.hp_growth, cd.attack_growth, cd.defence_growth, cd.pierce_growth, cd.speed_growth, cd.profession, cd.coll_attack, cd.coll_speed, cd.coll_hp, cd.passive_introduce_one, cd.passive_introduce_two, cs.is_delete, cs.flyup, cd.passive_introduce_three, cd.passive_introduce_threee, cd.passive_introduce_four, cd.passive_introduce_one_str, cd.passive_introduce_two_str, cd.passive_introduce_three_str, cd.passive_introduce_four_str, cd.wl_atk, cd.hy_atk, cd.ds_atk, cd.fd_atk, cd.wl_def, cd.hy_def, cd.ds_def, cd.fd_def, cd.sex, cd.zl_def from characters cs left join card cd on cd.id=cs.id where cs.user_id = #{userId} and cs.is_delete='0'

select cs.uuid, cs.user_id, cs.id, cs.lv, cd.star, cs.stack_count, cs.go_into_num, cs.exp, cs.max_lv, cd.name, cd.camp, cd.hp_growth, cd.attack_growth, cd.defence_growth, cd.pierce_growth, cd.speed_growth, cd.profession, cd.coll_attack, cd.coll_speed, cd.coll_hp, cd.passive_introduce_one, cd.passive_introduce_two, cs.is_delete, cs.flyup, cd.passive_introduce_three, cd.passive_introduce_threee, cd.passive_introduce_four, cd.passive_introduce_one_str, cd.passive_introduce_two_str, cd.passive_introduce_three_str, cd.passive_introduce_four_str, cd.wl_atk, cd.hy_atk, cd.ds_atk, cd.fd_atk, cd.wl_def, cd.hy_def, cd.ds_def, cd.fd_def, cd.sex, cd.zl_def from characters cs left join card cd on cd.id=cs.id where cs.user_id = #{userId} and cs.id = #{id} and cs.is_delete='0' limit 1

select cs.uuid, cs.user_id, cs.id, cs.lv, cd.star, cs.stack_count, cs.go_into_num, cs.exp, cs.max_lv, cs.flyup, cd.name, cd.camp, cd.hp_growth, cd.attack_growth, cd.defence_growth, cd.pierce_growth, cd.speed_growth, cd.profession, cs.is_delete, cd.coll_attack, cd.coll_speed, cd.coll_hp, cd.passive_introduce_one, cd.passive_introduce_two, cd.passive_introduce_three, cd.passive_introduce_threee, cd.passive_introduce_four, cd.passive_introduce_one_str, cd.passive_introduce_two_str, cd.passive_introduce_three_str, cd.passive_introduce_four_str, cd.wl_atk, cd.hy_atk, cd.ds_atk, cd.fd_atk, cd.wl_def, cd.hy_def, cd.ds_def, cd.fd_def, cd.sex, cd.zl_def from characters cs left join card cd on cd.id=cs.id where cs.user_id = #{userId} and cs.go_into_num <> 0 and cs.is_delete='0'

select cs.uuid, cs.user_id, cs.id, cs.lv, cd.star, cs.stack_count, cs.go_into_num, cs.exp, cs.max_lv, cs.flyup, cd.name, cd.camp, cd.hp_growth, cd.attack_growth, cd.defence_growth, cd.pierce_growth, cd.speed_growth, cd.profession, cs.is_delete, cd.coll_attack, cd.coll_speed, cd.coll_hp, cd.passive_introduce_one, cd.passive_introduce_two, cd.passive_introduce_three, cd.passive_introduce_threee, cd.passive_introduce_four, cd.passive_introduce_one_str, cd.passive_introduce_two_str, cd.passive_introduce_three_str, cd.passive_introduce_four_str, cd.wl_atk, cd.hy_atk, cd.ds_atk, cd.fd_atk, cd.wl_def, cd.hy_def, cd.ds_def, cd.fd_def, cd.sex, cd.zl_def from characters cs left join card cd on cd.id=cs.id where find_in_set(cs.user_id,#{userIds})and cs.go_into_num <> 0 and cs.is_delete='0'
mapper.update:
-- 第一步：将lv=0的记录更新为1 UPDATE characters SET lv = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE lv = 0 AND is_delete = '0';
-- 第二步：标记重复数据中较差的记录为删除 -- 对于同一userId和id，如果有两条记录A和B -- 如果 A.stackCount >= B.stackCount AND A.lv >= B.lv AND A.flyup >= B.flyup -- 且至少有一个字段严格大于，则标记B为删除 UPDATE characters c1 INNER JOIN characters c2 ON c1.user_id = c2.user_id AND c1.id = c2.id AND c1.uuid != c2.uuid AND c1.is_delete = '0' AND c2.is_delete = '0' SET c2.is_delete = '1', c2.update_time = NOW() WHERE ( c1.stack_count >= c2.stack_count AND c1.lv >= c2.lv AND (c1.flyup IS NOT NULL AND c2.flyup IS NOT NULL AND c1.flyup >= c2.flyup) ) AND ( c1.stack_count > c2.stack_count OR c1.lv > c2.lv OR (c1.flyup IS NOT NULL AND c2.flyup IS NOT NULL AND c1.flyup > c2.flyup) );
